GitCredentialDialog.title: 需要身份验证
GitCredentialDialog.description: 远程服务器要求输入凭据。请输入用户名和密码（或个人访问令牌）。
GitCredentialDialog.passwordHint: 请输入服务器的用户名和密码。
GitCredentialDialog.saveCredentials: 保存凭据以供后续操作使用

AppearanceSettings.sectionDescription: 选择浅色、深色或跟随系统主题，设置会自动保存。

SystemSettings.proxyRequired: 启用代理时必须填写代理地址
SystemSettings.languageDescription: 设置应用语言。跟随系统时，若系统语言不受支持将回退为英文。
SystemSettings.updateDescription: 点击检查后会从配置的发布源拉取最新版本信息，有新版本时可直接下载并安装。
SystemSettings.installSuccess: 升级包已安装，正在重启应用

templates.gemini:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
---

# Skill Name

Instructions for the agent when this skill is active.

## Workflow

1. Add actionable step one.
2. Add actionable step two.
templates.openCode:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
---

# Purpose

Describe what this skill helps with.

# Steps

1. Add actionable step one.
2. Add actionable step two.
templates.openClaw:
---
name: example-skill
description: Describe when this skill should be used.
user-invocable: true
disable-model-invocation: false
---

# Purpose

Describe what this skill helps with.

# Instructions

1. Add actionable instruction one.
2. Add actionable instruction two.
templates.default:
# Skill: example-skill

## When to use

- Describe trigger conditions.

## Instructions

1. Add actionable instruction one.
2. Add actionable instruction two.

hint.custom: 填写 API URL、API Key 和 Model，分别映射到 GOOGLE_GEMINI_BASE_URL / GEMINI_API_KEY / GEMINI_MODEL。

hint.vertexApiKey: 使用 Vertex AI API key 时填写 GOOGLE_API_KEY。
